findings.location: s1 — 関連するハンドラ table
findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax `:doc:`DataReadHandler`` and `:doc:`MessageReplyHandler`` leaks into the markdown content. In a JSON knowledge file, these render as literal text including the `:doc:` markup, which is not valid Markdown and adds noise for AI consumers.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST `:doc:` directives: `:doc:`DataReadHandler`` and `:doc:`MessageReplyHandler``. Knowledge file should convert these to plain class names or standard markdown links.
